title: PolicyBundle
description: Policy bundle defining what a session is allowed to do. Generated by Policy Service, delivered via Session Service.

policyBundleVersion.description: Dated version string identifying when this policy was generated (e.g., 2026-02-21.1).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version of the bundle format, used by the client for compatibility checks.

sessionId.description: Session this policy was generated for. Client must verify match.

expiresAt.description: Bundle expiry. Client must not use an expired bundle.

capabilities.description: List of granted capabilities with scope constraints.

llmPolicy.description: LLM usage constraints for this session.

approvalRules.description: Approval rules referenced by capabilities via approvalRuleId.

allowedModels.description: Model IDs the agent may request.

maxInputTokens.description: Maximum tokens in a single LLM request.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens in a single LLM response.

maxSessionTokens.description: Total token budget across the entire session.

approvalRuleId.description: Unique identifier for this rule, referenced by capabilities.

title.description: Short title shown in the approval dialog.

description.description: Explanation shown in the approval dialog.
